task_completion.description: Create a new ground station named 'Cherry_Springs' with the specified coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict 'New ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog showing Name: 'Cherry_Springs', Latitude: 41.6615, Longitude: -77.8232 (or 77.8232 W), and Altitude: 701.

task_completion.description: Set 'Cherry_Springs' as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GPredict preferences, module settings, or the main window showing 'Cherry_Springs' selected as the active or default QTH (ground station).

task_completion.description: Adjust the minimum elevation setting to 20 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GPredict preferences or pass prediction settings showing the minimum elevation parameter set to 20.

task_completion.description: Export upcoming satellite pass predictions for the ISS to ~/Documents/ISS_passes.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, text editor, or terminal output showing the file 'ISS_passes.txt' in the Documents folder. The file must contain tabular pass data (AOS, LOS, Max El) for ISS ZARYA (NORAD 25544).

task_completion.description: Export upcoming satellite pass predictions for the CSS to ~/Documents/CSS_passes.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, text editor, or terminal output showing the file 'CSS_passes.txt' in the Documents folder. The file must contain tabular pass data (AOS, LOS, Max El) for CSS TIANHE (NORAD 48274).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GPredict graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: GPredict application windows and dialogs should be visible in the screenshots for configuring the ground station and generating passes.

integrity.description: Verify the exported text files contain actual tabular satellite pass prediction data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of ISS_passes.txt and CSS_passes.txt should look like genuine software-generated tables with columns like AOS, LOS, and Max El, rather than manually typed dummy text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just use terminal commands to create fake output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using 'echo' or 'cat' commands in a terminal to write fake pass data directly into the target .txt files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Station: Name must be 'Cherry_Springs', Latitude 41.6615, Longitude -77.8232 (or 77.8232 W), Altitude 701m. Minimum elevation must be set to 20 degrees. ISS export file: /home/ga/Documents/ISS_passes.txt (must contain keywords ISS, ZARYA, or 25544). CSS export file: /home/ga/Documents/CSS_passes.txt (must contain keywords CSS, TIANHE, or 48274). Both export files must contain standard Gpredict export columns: 'AOS', 'LOS', and 'Max El'.
